task_completion.description: Set the WorldInfo title to the expected demo name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or properties panel, the 'title' field under the 'WorldInfo' node is set to 'Robot Navigation Demo - TechExpo 2024'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Viewpoint position to an overhead bird's-eye view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or properties panel, the 'position' field under the 'Viewpoint' node is set to '0 0 3' or '0.0 0.0 3.0'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Viewpoint fieldOfView to 1.2 radians.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or properties panel, the 'fieldOfView' field under the 'Viewpoint' node is set to '1.2'.

task_completion.description: Update the Background skyColor to a dark navy blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or properties panel, the 'skyColor' field under the 'Background' node is set to '0.05 0.05 0.2'. The 3D viewport should also reflect a dark blue background.

task_completion.description: Save the configured world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Desktop/demo_configured.wbt', or the Webots main window title bar updated to show 'demo_configured.wbt', or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Webots GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Webots Scene Tree and editing values in the Webots interface, rather than using terminal commands to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually inject the expected values into the .wbt file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like gedit, nano, vim, or VS Code) are visible editing the raw .wbt file directly.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file through the application rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots 'File -> Save World As...' menu or dialog is used, and the application remains open with the new filename in the title bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Desktop/demo_configured.wbt. Expected WorldInfo title: 'Robot Navigation Demo - TechExpo 2024'. Expected Viewpoint position: [0, 0, 3.0]. Expected Viewpoint fieldOfView: 1.2. Expected Background skyColor: [0.05, 0.05, 0.2].
